overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside a futuristic metro train (NCART) in Cyberpunk 2077, departing Ebunike station at dawn (05:30) and traveling on elevated tracks through the dense skyscrapers of Night City. The clip shows the transition from station platform to open urban views with neon billboards and towering buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro station platform with safety barriers

events.description: train begins departing station, platform starts moving past the window

agents.ego_description: seated inside the metro car observing the departure from Ebunike station

entered.detail: illuminated digital map showing the NCART metro line with colored routes
concrete platform with yellow tactile paving strips
diagonal black and yellow warning stripes on platform edge
large structural columns supporting the station roof
curved metal window frames and interior panels of the metro car

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a stationary view from inside a futuristic metro car at Ebunike station. The platform with yellow safety markings is visible through the window, while a glowing digital map display dominates the center of the frame. As the train departs around the 8-second mark, the platform begins sliding past, transitioning from the station interior to the enclosed track infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed elevated metro track passing through urban infrastructure

events.description: digital display updates from showing current location 'EBUNIKE' to showing 'NEXT STOP: JAPANTOWN SOUTH'
train emerges from enclosed structure into open elevated track with panoramic city views becoming visible

agents.ego_description: traveling on the metro while observing the digital information displays and passing urban infrastructure

entered.detail: illuminated panel showing 'NCART' logo and route information
text display reading 'YOU ARE AT: EBUNIKE' with green NCART branding
digital clock showing '05:30' with sun icon indicating dawn
text display reading 'NEXT STOP: JAPANTOWN SOUTH' with directional arrows
orange text label reading 'WESTBROOK' on the digital display

segments.scene_description: The train travels through enclosed urban infrastructure with metal supports and concrete structures visible through the windows. Digital displays inside the car show the current location as 'EBUNIKE' in the Heywood district before updating to show the next stop as 'Japantown South' in Westbrook. Around 28 seconds, the train emerges from the enclosed track section, revealing the open cityscape of Night City with towering skyscrapers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro line curving through dense futuristic downtown canyon

events.description: train navigates a curve, shifting the perspective to reveal different angles of the city skyline
train passes extremely close to a building facade, temporarily filling the window with concrete and metal structure

agents.ego_description: riding the elevated metro through the heart of the city, observing the dense cluster of skyscrapers and neon advertisements

entered.detail: dense collection of futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows
large illuminated advertisement with red and orange graphics on building side
multi-level road structure running parallel to the metro tracks
distinctive cylindrical skyscraper with reflective glass facade
floating digital billboards and brand logos including 'nCola' advertisements
building with diagonal white structural beams and green-tinted windows

segments.scene_description: The train travels on elevated tracks through the dense urban canyon of Night City, surrounded by towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows and massive neon billboards. The camera captures views of the futuristic architecture including curved glass towers and buildings with geometric facades. The train curves through the city, occasionally passing close to building structures that temporarily obscure the view, while the morning sun casts light on the upper levels of the buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a futuristic metro car as it departs a stationary station and emerges into the sprawling urban expanse of Night City. It begins with a view of the Ebunike station platform and a glowing digital map, which quickly slides away as the train accelerates into enclosed track infrastructure characterized by concrete supports and metal beams. As the train moves, the interior digital displays shift from the Heywood district toward Japantown South, before the enclosed tunnel finally opens up to reveal a vast cityscape of distant skyscrapers. The scene then expands into a dense urban canyon where the train curves past towering glass towers and massive neon billboards, with the morning sun beginning to illuminate the upper levels of the futuristic architecture.
